name: Pink Framed Fabric Kids' Photo Memo Board - Pillowfort™
description: Whether you're setting up your kid's new room or updating an old one, add the Pink Framed Fabric Photo Memo Board from Pillowfort™. This printed memo board is covered with floral print and features a pink frame for a delightful look. Made of soft fabric with a resin frame, this framed memo board is great for displaying photos and much more.
